description_long: This is a long, slender croissant wrapped partially in a translucent white and red-printed bakery paper. The pastry itself has a golden-brown, slightly uneven crust with visible baked texture and a few cracks, suggesting a crisp exterior. The wrapping covers the central portion, leaving both ends exposed, where the flaky, layered structure of the croissant is subtly visible. The croissant appears to be of the classic French style, with a slightly curved, tapered shape and a light, airy interior implied by the surface texture. The paper wrapping is thin and slightly crinkled, conforming to the shape of the pastry. There are no visible toppings or fillings on the croissant, and the overall appearance is clean and appetizing.
description: A golden-brown, classic croissant partially wrapped in translucent bakery paper, with a crisp, flaky exterior and exposed ends.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the croissant, with both ends and the central paper wrapping clearly visible.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the tapered tip of the croissant and the way the paper wraps around the middle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the length and the paper wrapping, with slightly different lighting and crust texture.
description_view_3: End view from the opposite tip, showing the rounded, baked end and the paper wrapping's seam.
